name: Default
description: Explore / Plan / optional Design / Agent / Refine / Execute product prototype workflow
prompt: Use this single default workflow silently. Do not ask the user to choose a template.
- Explore: understand the user's idea and the current project in plain language.
- Plan: clarify the product prototype with Fast or Slow questioning.
- Design: optionally use proto-image-gen to create prototype/product visuals on the canvas, and proto-image-edit to revise them. The user can skip Design and go directly from Plan to Agent.
- Agent: generate a durable executable agent file from the product brief.
- Refine: let the user adjust the agent before execution.
- Execute: after confirmation, follow the generated agent file and implement.
